channel.title: I18n on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in I18n on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: UX & Design Systems: Tokens, Dark Mode, and Bilingual
item.description:
The Problem With “Just Make It Look Good”#

Every engineer who has ever touched CSS knows the feeling: you open a stylesheet written six months ago and discover forty-seven shades of grey, twelve font sizes that follow no discernible scale, and a dark mode implementation that consists of filter: invert(1) on the body element. The code works. The site renders. But every new feature requires archeology — digging through layers of ad-hoc decisions to figure out what the “right” shade of muted text is supposed to be.
